items.claim: Paddy Pimblett is more dangerous than Benoit Saint Denis when fighting off his back.
items.quote: Paddy, if he's taken down, he's way more dangerous off his back.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis lacks the ability to submit Paddy Pimblett.
items.quote: I don't think he has the ability to submit Paddy Pimblett.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett's non-traditional striking angles make his attacks difficult to defend.
items.quote: The shots come at weird angles, but that actually ends up helping Paddy because they're unexpected, weird, non-traditional angles

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett maintains a higher work rate than Benoit Saint Denis.
items.quote: Paddy Pimblett is ferocious. He He's got a higher work rate.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett possesses high durability and resilience.
items.quote: he showed against Justin Gaethje there was absolutely no quit in the man.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis is vulnerable to being controlled on the ground.
items.quote: look at what Renato Moicano was able to do to Benoit Saint Denis once he got on top of him.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett is physically large for the lightweight division.
items.quote: Paddy's very big for this weight class.
